body:
Implemented new method to which returns a thermodynamic state for a given pressure, temperature, and relative humidity. This method calls on PhaseEquil_pTq.

Implemented two correctness tests for this method. Additional tests for type stability are still needed. Also, I would greatly appreciate a double check of my second correctness test for PhaseEquil_pTRH.
title: Implemented PhaseEquil_pTRH
